custom-sql.sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT LoopDivision.loopDivisionId) AS COUNT_VALUE FROM LoopDivision INNER JOIN Organization_ ON LoopDivision.organizationId = Organization_.organizationId [$INNER_JOIN$] [$WHERE_CLAUSE$]
SELECT LoopDivision.loopDivisionId FROM LoopDivision INNER JOIN Organization_ ON LoopDivision.organizationId = Organization_.organizationId [$INNER_JOIN$] [$WHERE_CLAUSE$] [$ORDER_BY$] [$LIMIT$]
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT LoopPerson.loopPersonId) AS COUNT_VALUE FROM LoopPerson INNER JOIN User_ ON LoopPerson.personUserId = User_.userId [$JOINS$] (User_.status = ?)
SELECT LoopPerson.loopPersonId FROM LoopPerson INNER JOIN User_ ON LoopPerson.personUserId = User_.userId [$JOINS$] (User_.status = ?) ORDER BY User_.firstName ASC, User_.lastName ASC [$LIMIT$]

INNER JOIN LoopParticipantAssignment loopParticipantAssignment1 ON LoopPerson.loopPersonId = loopParticipantAssignment1.loopPersonId INNER JOIN LoopDivision ON loopParticipantAssignment1.loopDivisionId = LoopDivision.loopDivisionId LEFT JOIN LoopParticipantAssignment loopParticipantAssignment2 ON (loopParticipantAssignment1.loopPersonId = loopParticipantAssignment2.loopPersonId) AND (loopParticipantAssignment2.loopDivisionId = ?) AND (loopParticipantAssignment2.type_ = ?) WHERE (loopParticipantAssignment2.loopPersonId IS NULL) AND (LoopDivision.loopDivisionId IN ([$VALUES$]))

SELECT TEMP_TABLE.loopUserNotificationEventId AS loopUserNotificationEventId FROM ( SELECT LoopUserNotificationEvent.loopUserNotificationEventId, LoopUserNotificationEvent.createTime, LoopUserNotificationEvent.groupKey FROM LoopUserNotificationEvent WHERE (LoopUserNotificationEvent.createTime [$TIMESTAMP_COMPARATOR$] ?) AND (LoopUserNotificationEvent.recipientUserId = ?) ) TEMP_TABLE GROUP BY TEMP_TABLE.groupKey ORDER BY MAX(TEMP_TABLE.createTime) DESC [$LIMIT$]
